patch.value: Capability: CLI command surface & agent ergonomics
Evolve the CLI command surface and lifecycle primitives for agent and human ergonomics (bulk ops, query filters, hierarchy views, history diffs)
Evolve the CLI command surface and lifecycle primitives for agent and human ergonomics (bulk ops, query filters, hierarchy views, history diffs)
Faster, safer agent/human workflows over the core item lifecycle
Never-block error contract holds across the command surface (recovery bundle with next steps on every failure path); agent-UX audit findings closed or waived.

## Charter
Living capability epic for the CLI command surface and agent ergonomics: lifecycle primitives (create/update/close/claim/next), bulk operations, query filters, hierarchy views, output projections, and never-block error UX. pm is agent-first: every command must be usable by an agent with zero out-of-band context, and every error must carry a machine-actionable recovery path.

## Scope
- In: command surface additions/refinements, flag ergonomics, output formats (toon/json/csv/table), never-block guidance, did-you-mean suggestions, agent token-efficiency of outputs.
- Out: MCP tool surface (pm-5k4v), storage/history internals (pm-o2kc), extension-owned commands (pm-ugqx).

## Status
97 closed children delivered the v0.1 surface (next, focus, plan family, update-many, list projections, close structured fields, shortcuts, aliases). This epic stays OPEN as a living backlog per the capability-epic convention — new command-surface work lands here.

## Open children (2026-07-04)
- pm-qt5d — --pm-path package install leaks extensions into caller workspace (path-scoping safety).
- pm-gdi7 — unknown-option flag suggestions, list-closed projection, schema add-field help discoverability.
- pm-b3e9 — pre-install package-owned command names should hint the owning install command.

## Open children (2026-07-04)
- pm-qt5d — --pm-path package install leaks extensions into caller workspace (path-scoping safety).
- pm-gdi7 — unknown-option flag suggestions, list-closed projection, schema add-field help discoverability.

## Update 2026-07-05
New initiative epic parented here: **pm-n7rr — CLI surface simplification** (noun-verb consolidation, ~60 -> ~15 top-level commands, zero feature loss). Children: pm-a22j token baseline, pm-0z7n alias shim layer, pm-pfqi list-* consolidation, pm-tqel history namespace, pm-tnud package namespace, pm-eq4x lifecycle sugar fold, pm-o3fh calendar sugar to builtin-calendar, pm-6apl ops namespace, pm-e2bq tiered contracts-driven help, pm-1kxs agent story. Grammar ADR: pm-pbyu (under pm-m2u1).

## Update 2026-07-06
Composability contract set filed here (stated product principle: pm composes with grep/jq/xargs for on-the-fly complex queries): pm-m9xv persona story, pm-646c NDJSON output mode for list/search/context, pm-psy1 test-gated scripting contract (exit codes, stdout/stderr discipline, field-name stability). Related existing items: pm-kipd stdin JSON create/update, pm-cfed lean JSON.
Never-block error contract holds across the command surface (recovery bundle with next steps on every failure path); agent-UX review findings closed or waived.
